query:
UPDATE builds
         SET
             rustc_version = $1,
             docsrs_version = $2,
             build_status = $3,
             build_server = $4,
             errors = $5,
             documentation_size = $6,
             rustc_nightly_date = $7,
             build_finished = NOW(),
             error_kind = $8,
             memory_peak = $9
         WHERE
            id = $10
         RETURNING rid as "rid: ReleaseId"
